# AssignedWorkDocument.ScoreAnnotation.Kind.correct

**Case**

A score mark indicating an correct answer.

## Declaration

```swift
case correct
```

## Score annotations

- **AssignedWorkDocument.ScoreAnnotation.Kind.bonus**: A score mark indicating a bonus to an answer.
- **AssignedWorkDocument.ScoreAnnotation.Kind.incorrect**: A score mark indicating an incorrect answer.
- **AssignedWorkDocument.ScoreAnnotation.Kind.unknown**: An unknown kind. This value may occur if an older version of this framework is deserializing a newer document version.
